allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s=fs.statSync\('public/og-image.png'\); console.log\('Size:', Math.round\(s.size/1024\)+'KB'\); const {execSync}=require\('child_process'\); try{const r=execSync\('node -e \\"const sharp=require\(\\'sharp\\'\); sharp\(\\'public/og-image.png\\'\).metadata\(\).then\(m=>console.log\(\\'Dimensions:\\',m.width+\\'x\\'+m.height\)\)\\"'\); console.log\(r.toString\(\)\)}catch\(e\){}")
